query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_template_ratings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  templateId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  rating INT NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workflow_template_ratings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  templateId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  rating INT NOT NULL,
  comment TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
